[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 01101010 4
3 11000001 3
4 01000000 1
5 11101011 6
6 11110001 5
7 01001100 3
